title: UK: Elderly man sexually assaulted by woman with Spanish accent
summary_full: According to the report, Thames Valley Police have urged anybody who witnessed the incident to come forward. Investigating officer Detective Constable Mandy Cutler said the attack happened in the early afternoon and appealed for information from members of the public.
